Subject: Thank you for applying to FactSet!
Body:
Dear Dennis, 

Thank you completing the first steps on the path to becoming part of the FactSet Advantage!

Your application for the Technical Principal Product Manager position has been received and is now under review. If your background matches our needs for this position, someone from FactSet Talent Acquisition will be reaching out to you to discuss your background in more detail.

Please be on the lookout for a follow up notification soon.

Thanks again Dennis, we look forward to working with you.

Regards,

FactSet Talent Acquisition
https://www.factset.com/careers
	
	
This email was intended for dennisnowland@virginmedia.com

Subject: Thank you for applying to Teramind
Body:
Hi Dennis,

Thank you for expressing interest in our Enterprise Customer Success Manager (Remote LATAM) role here at Teramind.

We truly appreciate your interest in joining our team and the effort you put into your application.

After carefully reviewing your background, we have decided to move forward with other candidates whose experience more closely aligns with our current needs. We know how much time and energy goes into a job search and we don't take that lightly.

We were genuinely impressed by your profile and will keep your resume on file as our team continues to grow. 

Wishing you all the best in your search!

Regards, 
 
Sheila Cubursi
Teramind Talent Acquisition Team

Subject: Thank you for applying to GitLab
Body:
Hi Dennis,

Thanks for applying to GitLab! We're thrilled you'd consider joining us, and wanted to confirm that we have received your application for the Manager, Professional Services Engineers (EMEA) role.

Although this is an automated message, our team is working hard to evaluate applications and we will be in touch if your experience is a good match for the position. Please know that it may take some time for us to get back to you.

In the meantime, feel free to get to know us a bit more. Here are a few places you can learn more about life at GitLab <https://www.linkedin.com/company/gitlab-com/life/general/?viewAsMember=true> :

*	Learn More about our Values <https://about.gitlab.com/handbook/values/> 
*	Meet the GitLab Team <https://about.gitlab.com/company/team/> 
*	Learn More About How We Communicate <https://about.gitlab.com/handbook/communication/> 
*	Learn More About Our Company Culture <https://builtin.com/company/gitlab> 

Also, just a heads up, sometimes these emails can get filtered to candidates' spam folders. Consider adding our domain (@gitlab.com) as a safe sender, adding us as a contact, or setting up a "not spam" filter rule to be sure our emails come through.

For better understanding of how Gitlab conducts interviews on a global scale, take a look at this handbook page <https://handbook.gitlab.com/handbook/hiring/candidate-faq/#how-we-conduct-remote-interviews-on-a-global-scale> .

Thanks again for your interest in GitLab! 


All the best,
The GitLab Recruiting team

 <https://about.gitlab.com/images/press/logo/png/gitlab-logo-100.png> 


P.S. For information about our privacy practices in the recruitment process, please view our Recruitment Privacy Policy <https://about.gitlab.com/handbook/hiring/recruitment-privacy-policy/> .
